sizing_rule.note: Position size calculated per market system using optimal f in dollars. Daily HPR = (Daily Dollar P&L / Optimal f in dollars) + 1. For portfolios, weight each system's HPR by allocation percentage.

source_rule_text: Position size for each market system should be based on its optimal f value, with daily HPR calculated as the ratio of daily dollars made/lost to optimal f in dollars, plus one.
